purpose: Reference-only credential destination for future owner-controlled Instagram OAuth for @agdigitalz in connected_draft_only mode.
rotationPolicy: Rotate or replace the external credential immediately after suspected exposure, permission expansion, owner revocation, provider compromise, or connector-store migration.
revocationPolicy: Owner can revoke by disconnecting Instagram in the approved external credential store, marking this reference revoked, and recording an audit event before any further OAuth attempt.
auditRequirement: Audit events are required before OAuth execution, after successful connection, after failed or blocked connection, and after revocation or rotation.
notes: Reference-only record. The actual OAuth secret must live only in an approved secure connector credential store outside Git, chat, logs, dashboard data, audit payloads, and client records.
